CREATE TABLE test_table (a Int32, b Int32);
SELECT a, b, a % b AS modulo_result FROM test_table;
SELECT a, b, a % b AS modulo_result FROM test_table WHERE a > 0;
SELECT a, b, a % b AS modulo_result FROM test_table WHERE b != 0;
SELECT a, b, a % b AS modulo_result FROM test_table WHERE a < 0 AND b > 0;
CREATE TABLE subquery_table AS SELECT a, b FROM test_table WHERE b != 0;
SELECT a, b, (SELECT a % b FROM subquery_table WHERE a = test_table.a) AS modulo_result FROM test_table;
SELECT a, b, a % (SELECT MAX(b) FROM test_table WHERE b > 1) AS modulo_result FROM test_table;
WITH (SELECT SUM(a) FROM test_table) AS total_a SELECT total_a, b, total_a % b AS modulo_result FROM test_table WHERE b != 0;
SELECT t1.a, t2.b, t1.a % t2.b AS modulo_result FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.a = t2.b WHERE t1.b > 1;
CREATE TABLE result_table AS SELECT a, b, a % b AS modulo_result FROM test_table WHERE a IS NOT NULL AND b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM result_table WHERE modulo_result = 0;
